description: Compile a Java smart contract source through the node's executor service. Returns the compiled byteCodeObjects (one per top-level class) ready to be passed to /SmartContract/Pack and /SmartContract/Deploy.
notes: The sourceCode MUST include 'import com.credits.scapi.v0.SmartContract;' (and any other Credits SDK base class actually used). Without it the executor returns 'Internal error processing compileSourceCode'. The endpoint timeout is 120s; complex sources may take 10–60s.
